behavior_summary: Provides the hatching/cinematic sequence for a 'pyros' item/instance. When triggered, the script runs a coordinated sequence that disables player control, moves the camera, plays music/SFX, advances the item's visual frames, spawns helper/timer processes, creates sprite/particle effects, applies periodic hit/damage bursts, and ultimately either transforms the item into a spawned NPC or restores normal control.
U8P_ENDPYRO::hatch (process) is a small entry check that, when its trigger condition is true, delegates the full choreography to U8P_ENDPYRO::func00F7.

U8P_ENDPYRO::func00F7 is the orchestration routine: it toggles avatar stasis, centers camera on the item, starts music, spawns helper timers and other instance methods (pyrosTransformForward/Reverse, pyrosBarkAndTransform, func20A1/func1EFA), repeatedly calls U8P_ENDPYRO::func0548 to step frames and check status, and drives repeated effect/damage loops until a terminating condition.

U8P_ENDPYRO::func0548 updates the item's animation frame/status and contains a branch that can create and initialize a new NPC at the item's location (Npc::create, set stats, pop into world) and then destroy the original item.
U8P_ENDPYRO::func00BC appears to be a short helper that spawns brief timed helpers and waits for them (used for pacing).
notable_control_flow: Entry guard: U8P_ENDPYRO::hatch checks the process trigger ('this' condition) and early-exits if not satisfied, otherwise calls U8P_ENDPYRO::func00F7.

Sequencing via spawn/pid/suspend: U8P_ENDPYRO::func00F7 and U8P_ENDPYRO::func0548 repeatedly spawn short timer/free helper processes (FREE::func1C19, FREE::func29D8, FREE::func1C8B) and suspend until they complete to create precise delays between steps.
Status-bit gating: item status bit 0x20 is cleared and later set (Item::andStatus / Item::orStatus) to lock/unlock state during the cinematic and to select branches inside U8P_ENDPYRO::func0548.
Looping/effect bursts: a local counter in U8P_ENDPYRO::func00F7 iterates (e.g., <= 6) to produce repeated sprite, SFX, and Item::receiveHit bursts while timing helpers pace the sequence.

Transform/creation branch: U8P_ENDPYRO::func0548 inspects Item::getFrame and an item 'Q' field and may enter a branch that creates an NPC (Npc::create), initializes stats (Npc::setStr / setInt / setDex / setHp), pop/spawn it into world, toggles NPC flags, calls NPC methods, and puts it into combat/targeting.
open_questions: Exact numeric meanings: the specific numeric frame values, status-bit semantics beyond 0x20, and the immediate hex literals near spawn sites are inferred but their precise gameplay meanings remain unclear.

FREE::* helpers: the precise behavior of FREE::func1C19, FREE::func1C8B, FREE::func29D8 and other 'FREE' functions (timers, random providers, or other utilities) is inferred from context but not confirmed.

PYROS instance methods: exact content and text of pyrosBarkAndTransform / pyrosTransformForward/Reverse / func20A1/func1EFA—these are instance methods and their internal effects/dialogue are not present in this script JSON.
Exact conditions that force the NPC-spawn branch in U8P_ENDPYRO::func0548 (what Item::getQ compares against and how that maps to world/design variants).
Whether any global script flags outside item status bits are intended to be set by this script (metadata shows none).

main_function.name: U8P_ENDPYRO::hatch
main_function.purpose: Entry trigger that checks the item/activation condition and, when true, starts the pyros hatching cinematic by calling the orchestration routine U8P_ENDPYRO::func00F7.
entry_conditions: Triggered by the 'this' activation/area entry condition (processType 0x0210) — interpreted as a fast-area or activation event for the item/actor.

function_map.name: U8P_ENDPYRO::hatch
function_map.role: entry guard that delegates to the orchestration routine when the activation condition is met

function_map.name: U8P_ENDPYRO::func00F7
function_map.role: primary hatching orchestration: controls avatar stasis, camera, music, spawned timing helpers, animation transforms, effects, hit bursts, and repeated calls to frame updater

function_map.name: U8P_ENDPYRO::func0548
function_map.role: advances item animation frames, checks item status and fields, and may spawn and initialize an NPC to replace the item

function_map.name: U8P_ENDPYRO::func00BC
function_map.role: short-timer/timing helper that spawns brief processes and waits for them (used for pacing/synchronization)

internal_calls.purpose: Delegates full U8P_ENDPYRO::hatch choreography when the entry trigger is true.
Advance the item's visual frame and check for the NPC-spawn/branch; used repeatedly as part of the timed sequence.
Spawn pacing/timing helper processes early in the orchestration to create short delays and synchronization points.

external_calls.purpose: Disable/enable player control during the cinematic sequence.
Center/move camera toward the pyros/item coordinates for the cinematic moment.
Start background music (id observed in raw) for the U8P_ENDPYRO::hatch cinematic.
Play sound effects at key moments during the U8P_ENDPYRO::hatch (impact/crack/burst).
Spawn visual particle/sprite effects around the item's coordinates during the U8P_ENDPYRO::hatch.
Apply periodic hit/damage bursts as part of the effect sequence (damage flags and magnitudes randomized).
Spawn PYROS instance methods and FREE::* helper processes then suspend to wait for completion, sequencing the choreography.
Read and write the item's animation frame to advance or reset visual state used by the U8P_ENDPYRO::hatch.
Check and toggle item status bit 0x20 to select behavior branch and lock/unlock the item during processing.

external_calls.callee: Npc::create / Npc::setStr / Npc::setInt / Npc::setDex / Npc::setHp / Item::pop / Item::destroy
external_calls.purpose: When branch conditions meet, create and initialize an NPC, place it at the item's coordinates, and remove the original item.
Use library/free utility functions for timed waits, randomness, and short helper tasks used to pace frame changes and randomize effect parameters.

external_calls.callee: PYROS methods (pyrosTransformForward, pyrosTransformReverse, pyrosBarkAndTransform, func20A1, func1EFA)
external_calls.purpose: Invoke instance-specific transform/bark animations and behaviors on the pyros object during the sequence.

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: Provides the hatching/cinematic sequence for a 'pyros' item/instance. When triggered, the script runs a coordinated sequence that disables player control, moves the camera, plays music/SFX, advances the item's visual frames, spawns helper/timer processes, creates sprite/particle effects, applies periodic hit/damage bursts, and ultimately either transforms the item into a spawned NPC or restores normal control.
